install_fields.label: REST API Key
install_fields.help: Your PagerDuty REST API Key. Create one at My Profile → User Settings → API Access Keys.

pagination.note: PagerDuty uses offset+limit pagination. Continue while more==true.

rate_limit.note: PagerDuty enforces per-user rate limits. The connector retries on 429 with exponential backoff.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync incidents and services from PagerDuty.

apis.name: List Incidents
apis.description: Fetch all incidents with offset-based pagination, return normalized docs.

apis.name: Get Incident
apis.description: Return a single raw PagerDuty incident by ID.

apis.name: List Incident Alerts
apis.description: Return raw alert dicts for a given incident.

apis.name: List Services
apis.description: Fetch all services with offset-based pagination, return normalized docs.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: Fetch all users with offset-based pagination, return normalized docs.

apis.name: List Schedules
apis.description: Fetch all schedules with offset-based pagination, return normalized docs.
